benchmark_name_quote: In this work, we introduce RGym, a lightweight, platform-agnostic APR evaluation framework for the Linux kernel designed to operate on local commodity hardware.
task_description: Linux内核自动程序修复评估，专注于内核空间调试和修复的复杂性
task_description_quote: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized automated program repair (APR) but current benchmarks like SWE-Bench predominantly focus on user-space applications and overlook the complexities of kernel-space debugging and repair.
dimension: Linux内核程序修复能力评估，包括定位、补丁生成、验证和成本/延迟考虑
dimension_quote: These characteristics make the kernel an ideal stress test for evaluating LLM-based APR, from localization to patch generation, validation, and cost/latency consideration.
evaluation_method: 通过编译修补后的内核、运行概念验证程序并报告结果来评估补丁质量

problem_domain: 操作系统内核开发，特别是Linux内核内存安全漏洞修复
problem_domain_quote: The Linux kernel poses unique challenges due to its monolithic structure, concurrency, and low-level hardware interactions.
problem_difficulty: 高难度内核级bug修复，包含内存损坏等最严重类型的bug

language_quote: From 6,088 Syzbot bugs, we retain those with fix commits, reproducers, crash reports, and kernel configs
data_size: 包含143个已验证的内核bug的数据集
data_size_quote: We test on a filtered and verified dataset of 143 bugs.
source_type: 来自Syzkaller内核模糊测试器和Syzbot自动崩溃报告系统的真实内核bug
source_type_quote: Syzkaller [6], a coverage-guided kernel fuzzer, together with Syzbot [5], an automated online crash reporting system developed by Google, provides a valuable ecosystem that makes kernel-bug collection possible
build_type: 官方自建，基于真实内核bug构建
build_type_quote: We organize a dataset of 143 kernel bugs from Syzbot into an easily consumable format and verified the reproducibility of the bug on the patch parent.
task_granularity: 代码修复，特别是内核内存安全漏洞修复
task_granularity_quote: automated program repair (APR) in the Linux kernel space
evaluation_metrics: 补丁通过率（pass rate）、错误补丁率（bad patch rate）、每bug平均成本
evaluation_metrics_quote: Our method achieves up to a 43.36% pass rate with GPT-5 Thinking while maintaining a cost of under $0.20 per bug.
input_modality: 崩溃报告、调用栈、bug诱导提交、内核配置
input_modality_quote: inputs (patch, commit, source, config, compiler, cores, timeout, metadata)
output_modality_quote: The LLM lists candidate functions, receives their definitions, and returns their patched definitions.
task_io_type: 崩溃信息到内核补丁代码
task_io_type_quote: Our APR generates a patch via the Simple Agent or Function Exploration Agent and tests it with RGym.
execution_environment: 使用docker捆绑作业依赖和QEMU虚拟机，在本地硬件上运行
execution_environment_quote: RGym runs locally using docker to bundle job dependencies and QEMU for VMs.
unique_features: 轻量级、平台无关的Linux内核APR评估框架，专注于本地商品硬件运行，解决了kGym对GCP的硬依赖问题
unique_features_quote: we introduce RGym, a lightweight, platform-agnostic APR evaluation framework for the Linux kernel designed to operate on local commodity hardware. RGym solves the compiler and dependency problem by smartly switching build dependencies using docker images depending on the kernel version or compiler string provided in the kernel configuration.

benchmark_name_quote: We built CodeX-Verify, a multi-agent system that uses four specialized agents to detect different types of bugs.

task_description_quote: We built CodeX-Verify, a system that runs four specialized agents in parallel: Correctness (logic errors, edge cases, exception handling), Security (OWASP Top 10, CWE patterns, secrets), Performance (algorithmic complexity, resource leaks), and Style (maintainability, documentation). Each agent looks for different bug types.
dimension: 代码正确性、安全性、性能和风格四个维度的错误检测
dimension_quote: Correctness (logic errors, edge cases, exception handling), Security (OWASP Top 10, CWE patterns, secrets), Performance (algorithmic complexity, resource leaks), and Style (maintainability, documentation)

evaluation_method_quote: Testing on 99 code samples with verified labels shows our system catches 76.1% of bugs, matching the best existing method while running faster and without test execution.

problem_domain_quote: Multi-Agent Code Verification with Compound Vulnerability Detection
data_size: 99个代码样本，覆盖16个错误类别
data_size_quote: Dataset of 99 code samples with verified labels covering 16 bug categories
source_type: 来自真实SWE-bench失败的代码样本

evaluation_metrics: 真阳性率、准确率、假阳性率

output_modality_quote: detect different types of bugs

We formalize how multiple vulnerabilities in the same code create exponentially more risk. We prove mathematically that combining agents with different detection patterns finds more bugs than any single agent.

benchmark_name_quote: The CodeSmellEval benchmark [37] proposed the Propensity Smelly Score (PSC), a probabilistic metric that estimates the likelihood of generating specific types of smell.
task_description: 评估大型语言模型生成代码的结构质量，特别是其产生代码异味（即影响可读性、可维护性或设计完整性的模式）的倾向性。
task_description_quote: This paper addresses this gap by systematically measuring, explaining and mitigating smell propensity in LLM-generated code. We build on the Propensity Smelly Score (PSC), a probabilistic metric that estimates the likelihood of generating particular smell types, and establish its robustness as a signal of structural quality.
dimension: 代码结构质量，具体为代码异味的倾向性。
dimension_quote: We build on the Propensity Smelly Score (PSC), a probabilistic metric that estimates the likelihood of generating particular smell types, and establish its robustness as a signal of structural quality.
evaluation_method: 使用倾向性异味分数（PSC），这是一个基于模型在自回归生成过程中预测的下一个令牌概率的概率度量。
evaluation_method_quote: The Propensity Smelly Score (PSC) is a probabilistic metric that estimates the likelihood that a LLM generates a specific type of code smell [37]. It relies on the next-token probabilities predicted by the model during autoregressive generation.
problem_domain: 软件工程，代码质量评估。
problem_domain_quote: Code smells offer a foundation for evaluating these broader quality concerns. They capture recurring design and implementation issues that affect readability, complexity, and long-term maintainability [8, 23, 36].

unique_features_quote: Instead of treating PSC as a standalone benchmark metric, we use it as an instrument for reasoning about the factors that influence smell propensity in LLM-generated code. Our study begins by assessing the robustness and explanatory value of PSC, establishing that it provides a stable foundation for causal analysis.

benchmark_name_quote: This study evaluates six closed-source and seven open-source LLMs using the Codeflaws, Condefects, and BugT datasets, with BugT being a newly constructed dataset specifically designed to mitigate data leakage concerns.
dataset_url_quote: To facilitate future study, we share our source code and experimental data in a GitHub repository 1. 1https://github.com/Xucranger/PLofLBFL

benchmark_name_quote: Our evaluation is performed on DNext [7], a proprietary, industrial-scale microservice system for the telecommunications sector.
task_description: 在多仓库微服务架构中，根据自然语言错误报告定位错误所在的代码文件。
task_description_quote: Bug localization in multi-repository microservice architectures is challenging due to the semantic gap between natural language bug reports and code... We propose reframing this as a natural language reasoning task... performing NL-to-NL search instead of cross-modal retrieval.
dimension: 错误定位的准确性和效率，特别是在多仓库环境下的搜索空间路由和分层定位能力。
dimension_quote: Our approach builds context-aware summaries at file, directory, and repository levels, then uses a two-phase search: first routing bug reports to relevant repositories, then performing top-down localization within those repositories.
evaluation_method: 使用Pass@k和Recall@k指标进行评估，其中k=10用于文件定位，k=3用于仓库路由。同时使用平均倒数排名（MRR）。
evaluation_method_quote: We evaluate performance using standard metrics: Pass@k and Recall@k. Pass@k measures the proportion of bug reports where at least one correct file is found in the top-𝑘 results. Recall@k measures the fraction of all correct files for a given bug that are successfully retrieved within the top-𝑘 results. Given that the maximum number of modified files for any bug in our dataset is 10 (average 7.2), we set 𝑘= 10 as a fair and comprehensive threshold... For the preliminary search space routing phase, we use a tighter 𝑘= 3.
context_dependency: 多仓库、多文件项目，涉及文件、目录和仓库三个层次。
context_dependency_quote: Our approach builds context-aware summaries at file, directory, and repository levels... This structured repository →directory →file search path provides an inherently transparent and auditable reasoning process.
problem_domain: 软件工程，特别是电信领域的微服务架构系统。
problem_domain_quote: Our evaluation is performed on DNext [7], a proprietary, industrial-scale microservice system for the telecommunications sector.

language_quote: Programming Language: Java
data_size: 包含46个仓库，7077个代码文件，约110万行物理代码，87个错误工单，平均每个工单涉及7.2个错误文件。
data_size_quote: Number of Repositories: 46, Total Number of Code Files: 7,077, Total Physical Lines of Code: ∼1.1M, Number of Bug Tickets: 87, Average Buggy Files per Ticket: 7.2

benchmark_name_quote: We present Precise Automatically Checked Instruction Following In Code (PACIFIC), a novel framework designed to automatically generate benchmarks that rigorously assess sequential instruction-following and code dry-running capabilities in LLMs...
task_description: 评估大型语言模型（LLM）的顺序指令遵循和代码干运行（即模拟代码执行）能力。模型需要根据给定的初始输入和一系列指令，执行指令并生成最终输出。
task_description_quote: ...a novel framework designed to automatically generate benchmarks that rigorously assess sequential instruction-following and code dry-running capabilities in LLMs... The model under evaluation is tasked with executing the instructions on the given input and producing the final output in the specified format.
dimension: 指令遵循的精确性、代码干运行（模拟执行）能力、处理多步任务的能力
dimension_quote: ...rigorously assess sequential instruction-following and code dry-running capabilities in LLMs... Our results highlight the importance of code instruction following and dry-running ability as core competencies for LLM-based code assistants...
evaluation_method: 基于规则的确定性评估，通过将模型输出与参考代码执行生成的预期结果进行简单比较。
evaluation_method_quote: PACIFIC benchmarks allow deterministic evaluation, relying on simple output comparison against expected results generated via reference code... To ensure transparency, reproducibility, and efficiency, PACIFIC employs a fully rule-based evaluation pipeline.
context_dependency: 多步顺序指令，指令可以串联形成复杂的多步任务。
context_dependency_quote: These instructions can be concatenated to form complex multi-step tasks... Multiple instructions can then be composed into a pipeline, where each instruction receives as input the output produced by the preceding one.
problem_domain: 计算机科学基础、算法与字符串操作
problem_domain_quote: We note that the instructions which are the framework’s building blocks are made to be easily dry-run by a first year computer science major... (Example instructions: 'next_perfect_square', 'shift_back', prime number, day of week calculation)
problem_difficulty: 可控制难度，范围从易到极具挑战性。难度维度包括指令数量和预期输出长度。
problem_difficulty_quote: ...while allowing control over benchmark difficulty... We introduce an approach to control sample difficulty... The difficulty dimensions are: (1) LLM input: the number of instructions in each sample (prompt). (2) LLM expected output: the expected length of each sample’s output.
language: 支持多种编程语言，包括Python、Java和C++。
language_quote: Currently, instructions are implemented in multiple programming languages, including Python, Java, and C++.
data_size: 规模可扩展，可根据参数（如每个编程语言的样本数）生成大量多样化的基准测试。
data_size_quote: To produce meaningful results, the framework must support large-scale and diverse benchmark generation... • Samples per Programming Language: The number of unique samples to generate for each supported language.
source_type: 通过框架自动生成，指令池作为构建块。

input_modality_quote: • Instruction Type: Either Code (instructions as code snippets) or NL (instructions expressed in natural language). (1) An initial input — either a number or a string. (2) A sequence of instructions — operations to be applied to the input.
output_modality: 代码执行后的最终输出值（数字或字符串）。
output_modality_quote: The model under evaluation is tasked with executing the instructions on the given input and producing the final output in the specified format.

task_io_type_quote: The model under evaluation is tasked with executing the instructions on the given input and producing the final output... (Instructions can be in Code or NL form)
execution_environment: 干运行（模拟执行），无需实际执行环境或外部工具。
execution_environment_quote: The framework emphasizes the ability of LLMs to simulate code execution (i.e. dry-running) without relying on external tools or agentic mechanisms.
unique_features: 1. 专注于评估代码干运行（模拟执行）能力，而非实际工具使用。2. 框架可自动生成基准测试，支持难度控制和抗污染设计。3. 提供确定性的、基于规则而非LLM评判的评估方法。
unique_features_quote: In contrast to existing approaches that often rely on tool usage or agentic behavior, our work isolates and evaluates the LLM’s intrinsic ability to reason through code behavior step-by-step without execution (dry running)... PACIFIC benchmarks allow deterministic evaluation, relying on simple output comparison against expected results generated via reference code, without requiring tool use or LLM-as-a-judge paradigms... The framework must provide explicit mechanisms for controlling the difficulty of the generated benchmarks... To produce meaningful results, the framework must support large-scale and diverse benchmark generation. Furthermore, it should allow rapid creation of alternative benchmark versions to mitigate training data contamination risks.

benchmark_name_quote: We introduce FrontierCS, a benchmark of 156 open-ended problems across diverse areas of computer science...
task_description: 评测LLM解决开放式计算机科学问题的能力，这些问题没有已知的封闭形式或确定性最优解。模型需要实现可执行程序来解决问题，而非直接输出答案。
task_description_quote: FrontierCS, a coding benchmark that evaluates LLMs on solving open-ended computer science problems, where no known closed-form or deterministic optimal solution exists in practice. Unlike math or reasoning benchmarks that require a direct answer (e.g., AIME), FrontierCS requires models to implement executable programs to solve the problem (e.g., LiveCodeBench).
dimension: 开放式推理、算法实现、解决方案质量、跨领域问题解决能力
dimension_quote: FrontierCS provides a benchmark at the frontier of computer-science difficulty. ... stress-testing a model’s ability to perform deep open-ended reasoning and discover nontrivial optimization strategies.
evaluation_method: 通过自动评估器运行生成的程序，根据任务特定指标（如打包密度、运行时间、内存使用）在资源限制下对输出进行确定性验证和定量评分，而非简单的通过/失败。
evaluation_method_quote: Each FrontierCS task can be solved by submitting executable code: the evaluator runs the program on generated instances and scores its outputs by task-specific metrics under resource limits (e.g., time and memory usage). ... Solutions with runtime limit can be automatically checked for validity and assigned a numeric score that reflects the quality of the solution, rather than a simple pass-or-fail.
context_dependency: 单任务问题，模型根据问题规范（及所需的I/O或API存根）生成独立的求解程序。
context_dependency_quote: The model is prompted with the problem specification (and any required I/O or API stubs) and must produce a self-contained solver program.
problem_domain: 计算机科学，包含算法优化（如NP-hard变体）和跨领域研究问题（操作系统、高性能计算、人工智能、数据库、编程语言、安全）。
problem_domain_quote: FrontierCS includes algorithmic problems, which are often NP-hard variants of competitive programming problems with objective partial scoring, and research problems with the same property. ... Research Problems, spanning six major CS domains: OS (Operating Systems), HPC (High-Performance Computing), AI (Artificial Intelligence research tasks), DB (Databases), PL (Programming Languages), and Security (cybersecurity and vulnerability analysis).
problem_difficulty: 前沿级，问题最优解未知或计算上不可行，旨在挑战计算机科学前沿难度。
problem_difficulty_quote: FrontierCS provides a benchmark at the frontier of computer-science difficulty. ... The global optimum is unknown to compute over all problem instances...
language: 未明确指定，但任务要求提交可执行代码，推断主要涉及通用编程语言。
data_size: 包含156个开放式问题，其中算法问题107个，研究问题49个。
data_size_quote: FrontierCS consists 156 problems across two tracks: Algorithmic Problems and Research Problems. The Algorithmic Problems track contains 107 problems... The Research Problems track contains 49 problems...
source_type: 由专家（包括CS博士和顶级竞赛编程参与者及出题者）设计和评审。算法问题改编自编程竞赛，研究问题源自真实世界计算机科学研究问题。
source_type_quote: designed and reviewed by experts, including CS PhDs and top-tier competitive programming participants and problem setters. ... The Algorithmic Problems track contains 107 problems adapted from programming contests... The Research Problems track contains 49 problems sourced from real-world computer science research questions...
build_type: 官方自建，由多所大学的研究团队和专家顾问共同构建。
build_type_quote: Contributors... Advisors... Affiliations... (列出了UC Berkeley, Princeton University等多所机构的研究人员)
contamination_status: 抗污染设计，通过参数化问题生成器产生大量可变难度的实例，使用新鲜的、未见过的测试用例来防止泄露和过拟合。
contamination_status_quote: Parametric Problem Generator: The task specification induces a large, variable-difficulty space of instances, enabling fresh, unseen test cases to prevent leak and overfitting.
task_granularity: 代码生成，生成完整的求解程序。
task_granularity_quote: Models solve these tasks by implementing executable programs rather than outputting a direct answer.
evaluation_metrics: 任务特定的定量评分指标（如打包密度），而非单一指标。
evaluation_metrics_quote: scored its outputs by task-specific metrics... assigned a numeric score that reflects the quality of the solution
input_modality: 自然语言（问题规范）及可能的代码存根。
input_modality_quote: The model is prompted with the problem specification (and any required I/O or API stubs)...
output_modality: 代码（自包含的求解程序）。
output_modality_quote: ...must produce a self-contained solver program.
task_io_type_quote: The model is prompted with the problem specification... and must produce a self-contained solver program.
execution_environment: 在资源限制（如时间和内存使用）下运行，具体环境未明确说明。
execution_environment_quote: the evaluator runs the program on generated instances and scores its outputs by task-specific metrics under resource limits (e.g., time and memory usage).
unique_features: 专注于开放式、未解决、可验证且多样化的问题。问题的最优解未知，但解决方案的质量可以客观评估。包含算法和研究两条轨道，鼓励在开放式环境中进行迭代改进而非追求确定性最优解。
unique_features_quote: FrontierCS, an unsolved, open-ended, verifiable, and diverse benchmark for computer science tasks. ... Unlike existing benchmarks that focus on tasks with known optimal solutions, FrontierCS targets problems where the optimal solution is unknown, but the quality of a solution can be objectively evaluated. ... The design of FrontierCS encourages iterative improvement in an open-ended landscape rather than aiming for a deterministic optimal solution, since none of its problems have known practical optima.

benchmark_name_quote: We create SWELOCMULTI, a large-scale multilingual dataset curated specifically for issue localization.
dataset_url_quote: 1Code and models will be released here: https://github.com/com/SalesforceAIResearch/SweRank
task_description: 软件问题定位，即根据自然语言错误描述或功能请求，在代码库中定位需要修改的相关函数。
task_description_quote: Maintaining large-scale, multilingual code-bases hinges on accurately localizing issues, which requires mapping natural-language error descriptions to the relevant functions that need to be modified.
dimension: 多语言代码排名能力、多轮迭代推理能力、问题定位准确性
dimension_quote: SWERANK+: Multilingual, Multi-Turn Code Ranking for Software Issue Localization
evaluation_method: 在问题定位基准上进行实验，评估定位准确性（如Accuracy@10），并与基线方法进行比较。
evaluation_method_quote: Our experiments on issue localization benchmarks spanning various languages demonstrate new state-of-the-art performance with SWERANK-MULTI, while SWERANKAGENT further improves localization over single-pass ranking.
context_dependency: 多文件、多语言代码库。
context_dependency_quote: modern code repositories grow in size and complexity to encompass thousands of files across multiple programming languages
problem_domain: 软件工程、软件维护、问题定位
problem_domain_quote: The maintenance of large-scale software systems constitutes a significant and ever-growing portion of the software development lifecycle. A persistent bottleneck in this process is software issue localization
problem_difficulty: 现实世界企业级软件系统的复杂问题定位
problem_difficulty_quote: real-world enterprise systems are inherently multilingual, comprising interconnected components written in diverse programming languages... complex issues that demand iterative reasoning or involve changes dispersed across multiple, loosely coupled functions.
language: JavaScript, Java, TypeScript, Ruby, Rust, Go, PHP, C, C++, Python
language_quote: SWELOCMULTI extends the data collection and filtering pipeline of SWELOC to encompass JavaScript, Java, TypeScript, Ruby, Rust, Go, PHP, C, and C++.
data_size: 大规模数据集，包含来自4060个仓库、56279个拉取请求的155663个训练实例。
source_type: 从GitHub上流行的开源仓库中提取，筛选条件包括：目标语言代码占比至少40%、超过1000星、过去六个月内有提交。数据来自与GitHub问题明确关联并包含测试文件修改的拉取请求。
source_type_quote: Following SWERANK's methodology, we identify popular open-source repositories on GitHub for each language, filtering for repositories with at least 40% code in the target language, over 1,000 stars, and at least one commit in the preceding six months. From this curated set, we extract pull requests (PRs) explicitly linked to GitHub issues that include test file modifications.
build_type: 官方自建
build_type_quote: We create SWELOCMULTI, a large-scale multilingual dataset curated specifically for issue localization.
task_granularity: 代码排名/检索
task_granularity_quote: reformulates issue localization as a retrieve-and-rerank problem
evaluation_metrics: Accuracy@10
evaluation_metrics_quote: Figure 1: Comparison of function localization accuracy@10 against the SWERANK baseline.
input_modality: 自然语言
input_modality_quote: mapping natural-language error descriptions to the relevant functions
output_modality_quote: identifying where in a codebase a fix should be applied
task_io_type_quote: mapping natural language descriptions... to specific code elements including files, modules, or functions.
unique_features: 首个专注于多语言软件问题定位的基准数据集，覆盖10种流行编程语言，并支持多轮代理式搜索进行迭代推理。
unique_features_quote: We present the first framework to address issue localization in a multilingual setting. ... We propose SWERANKAGENT, an iterative, multi-turn localization framework that further improves over single-pass ranking.

benchmark_name_quote: • Basket, a Bloom’s taxonomy-guided frAmework for Software security Knowledge EvaluaTion. This framework allows the systematic assessment of LLMs’ capabilities with respect to software security knowledge (Section 3).
task_description: 评估大型语言模型对软件安全知识的理解、应用和扩展能力，涵盖从事实回忆到高阶推理和创造性设计的六个认知层次。
task_description_quote: To answer this question, we developed Basket, a framework that enables the systematic assessment of LLMs guided by Bloom’s Taxonomy [22], a widely adopted framework in education research, which categorizes learning objectives across six cognitive levels: remembering, understanding, applying, analyzing, evaluating, and creating. ... to comprehensively assess how well LLMs comprehend, apply, and extend the software security knowledge boundary.
dimension: 软件安全知识理解，涵盖六个认知维度：记忆、理解、应用、分析、评估和创造。
dimension_quote: We assess six cognitive dimensions: remembering, understanding, applying, analyzing, evaluating, and creating.
evaluation_method: 使用多种数据集进行评估，包括精心设计的多项选择题、易受攻击的代码片段、课程评估、真实世界案例研究和基于项目的开放式创建任务。
evaluation_method_quote: Our methodology integrates diverse datasets, including curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets (SALLM), course assessments (Introduction to Software Security course), real-world case studies (XBOW), and project-based creation tasks (Secure Software Engineering course).
problem_domain: 软件安全
problem_domain_quote: Assessing the Software Security Comprehension of Large Language Models
problem_difficulty: 涵盖从低级认知任务（如回忆事实）到高级认知任务（如推理、架构评估和安全系统创建）的多个难度层次。
problem_difficulty_quote: Results show that while LLMs perform well on lower-level cognitive tasks, such as recalling facts and identifying known vulnerabilities, their performance degrades significantly on higher-order tasks that require reasoning, architectural evaluation, and secure system creation.
source_type: 多种来源：包括精心设计的多项选择题、易受攻击的代码片段（SALLM）、课程评估、真实世界案例研究（XBOW）和基于项目的创建任务。
source_type_quote: Our methodology integrates diverse datasets, including curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets (SALLM), course assessments (Introduction to Software Security course), real-world case studies (XBOW), and project-based creation tasks (Secure Software Engineering course).
build_type: 官方自建
build_type_quote: To answer this question, we developed Basket, a framework that enables the systematic assessment of LLMs guided by Bloom’s Taxonomy [22]...
task_granularity: 知识评估与理解，涵盖从事实回忆到创造性设计的多种任务粒度。
task_granularity_quote: Rather than introducing yet another benchmark for a single security task, we used a combination of curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets, course assessments, real-world case studies, and open-ended project tasks...
evaluation_metrics: 基于认知水平的可靠性能（知识边界）和准确性。
evaluation_metrics_quote: Beyond reporting aggregate accuracy, we introduce a software security knowledge boundary that identifies the highest cognitive level at which a model consistently maintains reliable performance.
input_modality: 自然语言问题、代码片段、案例研究描述等。
input_modality_quote: Our methodology integrates diverse datasets, including curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets (SALLM), course assessments (Introduction to Software Security course), real-world case studies (XBOW), and project-based creation tasks (Secure Software Engineering course).
output_modality: 自然语言答案、代码、设计等。
output_modality_quote: This way, such a framework allows us not only to measure an LLM’s factual recall abilities but also to probe deeper into its reasoning, diagnostic ability, and creativity in secure software development tasks.
task_io_type: 文本到文本、代码到文本、文本到代码等，取决于具体任务。
task_io_type_quote: Our methodology integrates diverse datasets, including curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets (SALLM), course assessments (Introduction to Software Security course), real-world case studies (XBOW), and project-based creation tasks (Secure Software Engineering course).
unique_features: 基于布鲁姆分类法的认知层次评估框架，旨在评估LLM的软件安全知识边界和识别其系统性误解模式，而非仅针对单一安全任务。
unique_features_quote: Rather than introducing yet another benchmark for a single security task, we used a combination of curated multiple-choice questions, vulnerable code snippets, course assessments, real-world case studies, and open-ended project tasks to comprehensively assess how well LLMs comprehend, apply, and extend the software security knowledge boundary. ... we introduce a software security knowledge boundary that identifies the highest cognitive level at which a model consistently maintains reliable performance. In addition, we identified 51 recurring misconception patterns made by LLMs across Bloom’s levels.

benchmark_name_quote: To address this gap, we propose SPELL, a comprehensive testing framework for LLM developers and the Secure Team, specifically designed to evaluate the weakness of security alignment in malicious code generation.
task_description: 评估大型语言模型在恶意代码生成任务中的安全对齐弱点。
task_description_quote: To address this gap, we propose SPELL, a comprehensive testing framework for LLM developers and the Secure Team, specifically designed to evaluate the weakness of security alignment in malicious code generation.
dimension: 安全对齐、恶意代码生成能力、越狱攻击成功率。
dimension_quote: specifically designed to evaluate the weakness of security alignment in malicious code generation.
evaluation_method: 通过系统构建越狱提示词，评估模型生成恶意代码的攻击成功率，并使用最先进的检测系统确认生成的代码是否为恶意。
evaluation_method_quote: Our framework employs a time-division selection strategy that systematically constructs jailbreaking prompts... Extensive evaluation across three advanced code models (GPT-4.1, Claude-3.5, and Qwen2.5-Coder) demonstrates SPELL’s effectiveness, achieving attack success rates of 83.75%, 19.38%, and 68.12% respectively across eight malicious code categories. The generated prompts successfully produce malicious code in real-world AI development tools such as Cursor, with outputs confirmed as malicious by state-of-the-art detection systems at rates exceeding 73%...
problem_domain: 网络安全、恶意软件生成。
problem_domain_quote: malicious code generation... including malware, ransomware, and other security threats.
source_type: 从先验知识数据集中提取句子智能组合。
source_type_quote: Our framework employs a time-division selection strategy that systematically constructs jailbreaking prompts by intelligently combining sentences from a prior knowledge dataset...

benchmark_name_quote: To fill this gap, we propose AdaptEval, a benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs on code snippet adaptation.
dataset_url_quote: We propose AdaptEval1, the first benchmark for code snippet adaptation... 1https://github.com/ztwater/AdaptEval.
task_description: 评估大型语言模型在代码片段适应任务上的性能。代码片段适应是代码重用过程中的关键步骤，涉及将代码片段从一个特定环境修改以适应另一个环境。
task_description_quote: AdaptEval, a benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs on code snippet adaptation. ... A critical step in this process is adaptation, where developers modify code snippets to fit their specific context.
dimension: 代码片段适应能力，包括对上下文的理解、对任务要求的遵循、以及执行具体代码修改的能力。
dimension_quote: AdaptEval enables the assessment of LLMs’ adaptation capabilities from various perspectives. ... evaluating LLMs’ performance across various individual adaptations.

benchmark_name_quote: We introduce the AI Productivity Index for Software Engineering (APEX–SWE), a benchmark for assessing whether frontier AI models can execute economically valuable software engineering work.
dataset_url_quote:
We have released an open-source dev set via Hugging Face with a CC-BY license1 and our grading harness is available open-source on GitHub.2
1https://huggingface.co/datasets/mercor/APEX-SWE
2https://github.com/Mercor-Intelligence/apex-evals
task_description: 评估前沿AI模型执行具有经济价值的软件工程工作的能力。包含两种任务类型：集成任务（构建跨异构云原语、业务应用和基础设施即代码服务的端到端系统）和可观测性任务（使用遥测信号（如日志和仪表板）以及非结构化上下文调试生产故障）。
task_description_quote: APEX–SWE assesses two novel task types that reflect real-world software engineering: (1) Integration tasks (n = 100), which require constructing end-to-end systems across heterogeneous cloud primitives, business applications, and infrastructure-as-code services, and (2) Observability tasks (n = 100), which require debugging production failures using telemetry signals such as logs and dashboards, as well as unstructured context.
dimension: 真实世界软件工程能力，特别是集成与可观测性任务中的认知推理和代理能力。
dimension_quote: Our analysis shows that strong performance is primarily driven by epistemic reasoning, defined as the ability to distinguish between assumptions and verified facts, combined with agency to resolve uncertainty prior to acting.
evaluation_method: 使用Pass@1和Pass@3指标。集成任务通过pytest套件验证正确性；可观测性任务采用FAIL_TO_PASS / PASS_TO_PASS方法，应用模型补丁并执行框架特定测试。
evaluation_method_quote: For the APEX–SWE leaderboard, we assess models’ outputs using Pass@1, defined as the percentage of tasks where the model’s first attempt passes all correctness tests. For Integration tasks, correctness is verified via a pytest suite that interacts directly with service APIs... For Observability tasks, correctness follows a FAIL_TO_PASS / PASS_TO_PASS methodology inspired by SWE-bench (Jimenez et al., 2024). The harness applies the model’s patch and executes framework-specific tests (pytest, go test, jest).
context_dependency: 跨平台集成、多服务环境、生产级应用和基础设施。需要处理长上下文依赖。
context_dependency_quote: Real production environments involve cross-platform integration, infrastructure provisioning, and debugging production failures with incomplete information. ... whereas Qwen3 Coder and Grok 4 perform considerably worse at 14%, struggling to manage the long-context dependencies required for complex integration tasks.
problem_domain: 软件工程，特别是云集成、基础设施即代码、生产环境调试。
problem_domain_quote: APEX–SWE assesses two novel task types that reflect real-world software engineering: (1) Integration tasks... (2) Observability tasks...
problem_difficulty: 真实世界生产级软件工程任务，复杂度高，反映现实世界的绿色工程工作流程。
problem_difficulty_quote: Tasks reflect realistic greenfield engineering workflows, including implementing idempotent payment pipelines, configuring serverless event-driven architectures, and synchronizing data between CRM and ticketing systems.
language: 集成任务未明确指定单一语言，涉及多种服务配置。可观测性任务涉及Go、Python、TypeScript、Java和C++。
language_quote: Each task includes a real GitHub issue from widely adopted programming languages, including Go, TypeScript, Python, Rust, and Java. ... Observability tasks are distributed across five languages: Go (30%), Python (25%), TypeScript (25%), Java (10%), and C++ (10%).
data_size: 包含200个任务：100个集成任务和100个可观测性任务。另有一个包含50个任务的开发集。
data_size_quote: Integration tasks (n = 100)... Observability tasks (n = 100)... We open-source the APEX–SWE evaluation harness and a dev set (n = 50).
source_type: 集成任务由拥有3年以上经验的软件工程师创建。可观测性任务源自真实世界的GitHub Issue–PR对，来自至少有350颗星的仓库。
source_type_quote: Tasks were created by software engineers with 3+ years of experience. ... Tasks are derived from real-world GitHub Issue–PR pairs, sourced from repositories with at least 350 stars.
build_type: 官方自建，由Mercor公司的专家团队构建。
build_type_quote: Production processes for APEX–SWE Integration and APEX–SWE Observability, leveraging Mercor’s platform of experts.
contamination_status: 设计上可能具有较低污染风险，因为任务基于新创建的集成场景和经过筛选的复杂GitHub Issue-PR对。
contamination_status_quote: Tasks were created by software engineers... Tasks are derived from real-world GitHub Issue–PR pairs... We filtered for complexity, selecting only patches with at least 100 lines of code impacting at least three files.
dataset_license_quote: We have released an open-source dev set via Hugging Face with a CC-BY license
task_granularity: 端到端系统构建与生产故障诊断修复，属于宏观工程任务。
task_granularity_quote: APEX–SWE assesses two novel task types that reflect real-world software engineering: (1) Integration tasks... which require constructing end-to-end systems... (2) Observability tasks... which require debugging production failures...
evaluation_metrics: Pass@1, Pass@3。此外还使用评估工程质量的评分标准（功能性、鲁棒性、风格）。
evaluation_metrics_quote: For the APEX–SWE leaderboard, we assess models’ outputs using Pass@1... We also report Pass@3 in this paper... APEX–SWE uses rubrics to assess engineering quality.
input_modality: 自然语言任务描述、系统提示、工具定义、文件（如interface.md）、日志、聊天历史、API规范。
input_modality_quote: The model receives a system prompt containing task instructions and tool definitions. ... The model is provided with a summary of the user issue, an interface.md file describing relevant repository functions, and specifications for available Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. Chat data is pulled from public developer discussions...
output_modality: 代码、配置脚本、基础设施即代码、补丁文件、终端命令序列。
output_modality_quote: Models are required to write application code, configure infrastructure, and deploy functioning services. ... before implementing a fix that resolves the issue...
task_io_type: 文本到代码与配置，以及代码/日志到修复方案。
task_io_type_quote: APEX–SWE assesses two novel task types... (1) Integration tasks... (2) Observability tasks...
execution_environment: 容器化环境，包含多种云服务模拟（AWS LocalStack）、业务应用（EspoCRM, Medusa等）、日志聚合系统（Loki, Grafana）、数据库（PostgreSQL）。模型通过终端、文件操作和MCP服务器工具与环境交互。
execution_environment_quote: The test stack includes cloud primitives (AWS LocalStack: S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, Kinesis) and production-grade business applications (EspoCRM, Medusa, Zammad, Plane). ... Each task deploys a containerized environment orchestrating five services: a client workspace, Loki and Promtail for log aggregation, Grafana for visualization, and Plane/Mattermost for ticket and chat context. ... Models have access to three categories of tools: Terminal (Bash execution...), File Operations..., and MCP Servers...
unique_features: 专注于真实世界、经济价值的软件工程任务，特别是集成和可观测性这两种新任务类型。强调认知推理和代理能力。包含复杂的身份验证和安全方案测试。
unique_features_quote: Unlike existing evaluations that focus on narrow, well-defined tasks, APEX–SWE assesses two novel task types that reflect real-world software engineering... Tasks have authentication schemes to test models’ ability to handle real-world credential management... Our analysis shows that strong performance is primarily driven by epistemic reasoning... combined with agency to resolve uncertainty prior to acting.

benchmark_name_quote: To address this gap, we introduce ABC-Bench, a benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate agentic back-end coding within a realistic, executable workflow.
task_description: 评估智能体在真实、可执行的工作流中进行后端编码的能力，要求智能体管理从仓库探索到实例化容器化服务并最终通过端到端API测试的整个开发生命周期。
task_description_quote: ABC-Bench require the agents to manage the entire development lifecycle from repository exploration to instantiating containerized services and pass the external end-to-end API tests.
dimension: 智能体后端编码能力，涵盖仓库探索、代码编辑、环境配置、部署和端到端测试的全生命周期评估。
dimension_quote: Real-world backend development mandates a continuous workflow spanning five distinct stages: (1) Repository Exploration (Expl.), (2) Code Editing (Code), (3) Environment Setup (Env.), (4) Deployment (Deploy), and (5) End-to-End Testing (E2E).
evaluation_method: 通过外部API级别的集成测试来严格评估正确性，只有在部署的服务正确启动并表现出预期行为时才给予通过。
evaluation_method_quote: Once the service is launched, we evaluate correctness strictly via external API-level integration tests, awarding credit only when the deployed service starts correctly and exhibits the expected behavior.
context_dependency: 仓库级别，涉及多文件项目，需要探索和理解整个代码库结构。
context_dependency_quote: Each task goes beyond localized code edits and requires the agent to configure the environment and instantiate a containerized service.
problem_domain: 后端开发，涵盖数据分析和搜索系统、商业平台、支付网关和开发者工具等多种实际工程领域。
problem_domain_quote: These domains range from data analytics and search systems to commerce platforms, payment gateways, and developer tooling.
problem_difficulty: 工程级，模拟真实世界的生产环境，要求端到端的操作能力。
problem_difficulty_quote: ABC-Bench closes this gap by assessing the complete backend lifecycle with end-to-end, deployment-oriented verification.
language_quote: 224 curated tasks spanning 8 backend programming languages and 19 frameworks
data_size: 包含224个任务。
data_size_quote: ABC-Bench comprises 224 tasks
source_type: 从2000个开源、MIT许可的仓库中筛选和构建。
source_type_quote:
Applied to 2,000 open-source repositories, it yields 224 curated tasks...
We initiate the process by filtering a pool of 2,000 open-source, MIT-licensed repositories
build_type: 官方自建，通过名为ABC-Pipeline的自动化工作流程从开源仓库生成任务。
build_type_quote: To construct the benchmark at scale, we build ABC-Pipeline, a task-generation workflow that produces candidate tasks from open-source backend repositories with greatly reduced manual intervention.
contamination_status: 从开源仓库新构建，旨在反映真实工程需求，污染风险相对较低。
contamination_status_quote: the tasks are drawn from a broad spectrum of real-world domains, ensuring that the benchmark reflects practical engineering needs.
task_granularity: 端到端的后端开发任务，包括代码修改、环境配置和部署。
task_granularity_quote: Each task goes beyond localized code edits and requires the agent to configure the environment and instantiate a containerized service.
evaluation_metrics: pass@1率
evaluation_metrics_quote: Even the top-performing model achieves only a 63.2% pass@1 rate
input_modality: 自然语言任务指令
input_modality_quote: the evaluation setup launches an outer container that hosts the agent, delivers the task prompt.
output_modality: 代码修改、环境配置文件和Dockerfile等
output_modality_quote: the agent is granted full autonomy to explore the repository, modify code, install dependencies, and update Docker configurations
task_io_type_quote: The agent must orchestrate the entire process without human intervention.
execution_environment: 隔离的沙箱容器环境，包含用于智能体的工作空间和用于部署服务的独立内部容器。
execution_environment_quote: We evaluate models and agents using a standardized, isolated sandbox environment, which strictly separates the agent’s workspace from the backend service under test.
unique_features: 首个涵盖完整后端开发生命周期（仓库探索、代码编辑、环境配置、部署、端到端测试）的基准，专注于评估智能体在真实、可执行工作流中的能力，并采用自动化流水线从开源仓库大规模构建任务。
unique_features_quote:
ABC-Bench is the only benchmark to encompass this entire lifecycle.
Distinct from previous evaluations, ABC-Bench require the agents to manage the entire development lifecycle from repository exploration to instantiating containerized services and pass the external end-to-end API tests.

benchmark_name_quote: To address this limitation, we present the first instruction-guided code completion benchmark, Controllable Code Completion Benchmark (C3-Bench), comprising 2,195 carefully designed completion tasks.
task_description: 评估代码大语言模型在代码补全任务中遵循用户细粒度指令的能力。它扩展了传统的代码补全，要求模型不仅基于上下文生成中间代码，还要遵循特定的实现指令。
task_description_quote: To effectively evaluate models’ instruction-following capabilities in code completion tasks, we propose the concept of Controllable Code Completion (CCC). As illustrated in Figure 1, CCC extends traditional code completion by incorporating diverse middle code variants and fine-grained control instructions.
dimension: 功能正确性和指令遵循能力
dimension_quote: This enhancement enables comprehensive assessment of both functional correctness and instruction adherence, providing a more complete evaluation of code completion capabilities.
evaluation_method: 自动评分机制，无需人工干预。对于实现控制补全（ICC）任务，通过单元测试验证功能正确性，并通过测量生成代码与指令要求的一致性来评估指令遵循度。对于规模控制补全（SCC）任务，侧重于结构一致性而非功能完整性，不使用单元测试验证。
evaluation_method_quote: Notably, C3-Bench employs automated scoring mechanisms, ensuring objective evaluation without human intervention. The evaluation encompasses two aspects: functional correctness, verified through Ti, and instruction adherence, assessed by measuring the alignment between the implementation approach in Gi and the requirements specified in Ii.
context_dependency: 考虑左右代码上下文（前缀和后缀代码）
context_dependency_quote: Code completion represents a specialized code generation task that requires models to generate intermediate code segments while considering both left and right context [1, 2].
problem_domain: 通用编程
language_quote: C3-Bench comprises 2,195 high-quality Python CCC instances, encompassing 1,286 ICC and 909 SCC task instances, respectively.
data_size: 包含2,195个高质量的Python可控代码补全实例，其中1,286个实现控制补全（ICC）任务实例和909个规模控制补全（SCC）任务实例。
data_size_quote: C3-Bench comprises 2,195 high-quality Python CCC instances, encompassing 1,286 ICC and 909 SCC task instances, respectively.
source_type: 数据集及其关联的单元测试源自两个广泛使用的高质量代码评估数据集：HumanEval和SAFIM。通过抽象语法树（AST）提取中间代码段，并利用先进LLM生成功能等效的实现变体。
source_type_quote: The dataset and its associated unit tests are derived from two widely-used, high-quality code evaluation datasets: HumanEval [8] and SAFIM [10]. To enhance task complexity and diversity, we have extracted extended middle code segments and developed multiple implementation variants, each accompanied by carefully crafted detailed instructions.

evaluation_metrics_quote: The evaluation encompasses two aspects: functional correctness, verified through Ti, and instruction adherence, assessed by measuring the alignment between the implementation approach in Gi and the requirements specified in Ii.

input_modality_quote: A CCC instance augments this framework by incorporating I (Fine-Grained Instruction), which specifies implementation requirements, thus forming a tuple (P, S, G, T, I).
output_modality_quote: Given a dataset {(Pi, Si, Gi, Ti, Ii)}, we train an LLM M to generate completions such that M(Pi, Si, Ii) →Gi.

task_io_type_quote: Given a dataset {(Pi, Si, Gi, Ti, Ii)}, we train an LLM M to generate completions such that M(Pi, Si, Ii) →Gi.
unique_features: 这是第一个指令引导的代码补全基准，专注于评估模型在代码补全中遵循细粒度指令的能力。它将任务分为两类：实现控制补全（ICC）和规模控制补全（SCC）。ICC评估遵循特定实现要求的能力，涵盖结构规范、算法实现、控制流和关键参数要求四类。SCC评估生成指定范围代码的能力，包括行跨度、多行和语句块补全。
unique_features_quote: The benchmark implements two primary evaluation mechanisms: Implementation-Control Completion (ICC) evaluates models’ ability to follow specific implementation requirements. Test cases share identical code context but vary in implementation instructions, covering four categories: Structural Specification, Algorithmic Implementation, Control Flow, and Critical Parameter Requirements. Scale-Control Completion (SCC) assesses models’ ability to generate code of specified scope, including Line Span, Multi-line, and Statement Block completions.

dimension_quote: a benchmark designed for cross-paradigm evaluation. ... Our analysis reveals a fundamental paradigmatic divergence: whereas SQL leverages implicit DBMS behaviors through its declarative structure, Python requires explicit procedural logic, making it highly sensitive to underspecified user intent.

evaluation_method_quote: Given a query Q and data environment D, the model synthesizes a program P such that Exec(P, D) → A. ... To establish a valid ground truth for the Text-to-Python task, we reconstructed the SQL logic using Python, ensuring the code explicitly replicated the DBMS-level operations.

task_description: 从自然语言规范生成寄存器传输级（RTL）硬件描述语言（HDL）代码，特别是Verilog和SystemVerilog代码，用于描述硬件电路的行为和结构。
task_description_quote: Large language models (LLMs) have recently made rapid progress in software code generation (Jiang et al., 2026; Guo et al., 2024; Huang et al., 2025), suggesting a compelling opportunity to generate RTL code directly from natural-language specifications.
dimension: 功能正确性、时序准确性、协议语义、结构一致性、可综合性、工业级任务覆盖度、难度分层。
dimension_quote: However, RTL code generation poses requirements that are completely different from software, since HDL describes concurrent hardware behavior with strict cycle-level timing, protocol semantics, and hierarchical structural constraints (Akyash & Mardani Ka- mali, 2025). As a result, general-purpose coding models, which are optimized for autoregressive, sequential text generation, often achieve surface-level syntactic correctness yet fail to reliably preserve temporal intent, handshake protocols, or globally consistent structure (Thakur et al., 2024).
evaluation_method: 通过模拟（仿真）和形式验证（包括基于断言的检查和布尔等价性证明）相结合的多分支验证流程来评估功能正确性。
evaluation_method_quote: By integrating a multi-branch verification pipeline that combines trace-driven temporal analysis with formal verification consisting of assertion-based checking and boolean equivalence proofs, VERI-SURE enables functional correctness beyond pure simulations.

benchmark_name_quote: We introduce StepShield, the first benchmark to evaluate when violations are detected, not just whether.
task_description: 评估AI代码代理安全检测器的时序性能，即检测违规行为的时间点，而不仅仅是是否检测到。
task_description_quote: StepShield, the first agent safety benchmark designed to evaluate the temporal performance of rogue agent detectors.
dimension: 检测及时性、早期干预能力
dimension_quote: StepShield focuses on the complementary problem of measuring detection timeliness.
evaluation_method: 使用三种新颖的时序指标进行评估：早期干预率（EIR）、干预间隔（IG）和节省的令牌数（Tokens Saved）。
evaluation_method_quote: We propose three novel temporal metrics: Early Intervention Rate (EIR), Intervention Gap, and Tokens Saved.
context_dependency: 代码代理轨迹的逐步分析
context_dependency_quote: StepShield provides a granular, step-by-step view of agent behavior, enabling a new class of evaluation focused on early intervention.
problem_domain: AI代理安全、代码安全、运行时监控
problem_domain_quote: StepShield complements these capability benchmarks by focusing specifically on safety evaluation with temporal granularity.
problem_difficulty: 分为三个严重性级别：明显（L1）、清晰（L2）和微妙（L3），基于检测所需的认知努力。
problem_difficulty_quote: We define three severity levels based on the cognitive effort needed for detection, not the potential harm (Table 2).
language: 主要涉及代码代理轨迹，未明确指定单一编程语言，但基于真实世界安全事件。
language_quote: StepShield contains 9,213 code agent trajectories, including 1,278 meticulously annotated training pairs and a 7,935-trajectory test set with a realistic 8.1% rogue rate.
data_size: 包含9,213个代码代理轨迹，其中训练集1,278个（639个恶意轨迹与639个干净轨迹配对），测试集7,935个（包含639个恶意、639个干净和6,657个良性轨迹，恶意率为8.1%）。
data_size_quote: StepShield contains 9,213 trajectories (see Appendix A for the full datasheet): • Training Set: 639 rogue trajectories, 639 paired clean trajectories (1,278 total). • Test Set: 639 rogue, 639 clean, and 6,657 benign trajectories (7,935 total, 8.1% rogue rate).

benchmark_name_quote: We propose SWE-Universe, a scalable and efficient framework for automatically constructing real-world software engineering (SWE) verifiable environments from GitHub pull requests (PRs).
task_description: 从GitHub拉取请求（PRs）中自动构建真实世界的软件工程（SWE）可验证环境，用于训练和评估编码智能体。每个环境包含一个问题描述（issue）、一个专家参考解决方案（代码补丁）以及可重用的测试验证器。
task_description_quote: We propose SWE-Universe, a scalable and efficient framework for automatically constructing real-world software engineering (SWE) verifiable environments from GitHub pull requests (PRs). Each such PR defines a self-contained training environment: the issue serves as a clear problem statement, the code patch offers an expert reference solution, and the accompanying tests can be repurposed into a verifier for agent proposed fixes.
dimension: 软件工程任务解决能力、跨语言泛化能力、真实世界环境构建与验证的可靠性
dimension_quote: Progress in this direction is critically dependent on large-scale, high-quality environments with reliable verification signals. ... it nonetheless restricts the development of agents with true cross-lingual generalization capabilities.
evaluation_method: 通过执行生成的验证脚本（evaluation.sh）来区分代码的错误状态和修复状态。脚本在错误状态下应失败（非零退出码），在修复状态下应成功（零退出码）。
evaluation_method_quote: The agent is then tasked with generating a verifier script, designated as evaluation.sh, whose objective is to reliably distinguish between the repository’s states based solely on its return code. ... A script is considered functionally correct only if it fails (exits with a non-zero status) in the buggy state and succeeds (exits with a zero status) in the fixed state.
context_dependency: 完整的GitHub仓库环境，包含源代码、依赖、构建工具链和测试。
context_dependency_quote: The pipeline begins by sourcing a large corpus of issue-linked pull requests (PRs) from public GitHub repositories. ... The process commences by applying the test patch to the repository.
problem_domain: 软件工程，涵盖多种编程语言和项目的真实世界问题修复。
problem_domain_quote: real-world software engineering (SWE) verifiable environments
problem_difficulty: 真实世界工程级难度，涉及复杂的依赖、平台特定配置和定制构建工具链。
problem_difficulty_quote: The intricate and heterogeneous nature of real-world repositories with their complex dependencies, platform-specific configurations, and bespoke build toolchains
language_quote: Our multilingual SWE-Universe is significantly larger than other recent multilingual efforts... as well as prominent Python-only datasets... We construct 807,693 multilingual, verifiable training instances
data_size: 807,693个可验证的多语言训练实例，来自超过52,000个独特的GitHub仓库。
data_size_quote: Using this method, we scale the number of real-world multilingual SWE environments to a million scale (807,693). ... we construct 807,693 multilingual, verifiable training instances sourced from over 52,000 unique GitHub repositories.
source_type: 来自公开GitHub仓库中与问题（issue）关联的拉取请求（PRs）。
source_type_quote: The pipeline begins by sourcing a large corpus of issue-linked pull requests (PRs) from public GitHub repositories.
build_type: 官方自建，使用自主训练的构建智能体框架自动构建。
build_type_quote: We introduce SWE-Universe, a scalable, reliable, and efficient framework for automatically constructing million-scale, real-world agentic software engineering environments. At its core is an autonomous building agent...
contamination_status: 通过过滤与已知下游基准重叠的PRs来防止数据污染。
contamination_status_quote: To prevent data contamination and ensure fair evaluation, we meticulously filter out any PRs that overlap with known downstream benchmarks.
task_granularity: 代码修复，根据问题描述生成或修改代码以通过测试。
task_granularity_quote: Each such PR defines a self-contained training environment: the issue serves as a clear problem statement, the code patch offers an expert reference solution, and the accompanying tests can be repurposed into a verifier for agent proposed fixes.
evaluation_metrics: 验证脚本的退出码（0表示成功，非0表示失败），用于区分代码状态。
evaluation_metrics_quote: A script is considered functionally correct only if it fails (exits with a non-zero status) in the buggy state and succeeds (exits with a zero status) in the fixed state.
input_modality: 自然语言（问题描述）和代码（仓库的当前状态）。
input_modality_quote: the issue serves as a clear problem statement
output_modality_quote: the code patch offers an expert reference solution
task_io_type_quote: Each such PR defines a self-contained training environment: the issue serves as a clear problem statement, the code patch offers an expert reference solution
execution_environment: 自包含的Docker环境，包含项目特定的依赖和构建工具链。
execution_environment_quote: certain Docker environments do not fully match the stated requirements
unique_features: 1) 规模巨大（百万级）、多语言的真实世界软件工程环境数据集；2) 采用迭代自我验证和环内黑客检测的构建智能体框架，确保高保真度和可验证性；3) 专门训练了高效的Qwen-Next-80B-A3B模型用于构建，在降低成本的同时提升成功率。
unique_features_quote: Using this method, we scale the number of real-world multilingual SWE environments to a million scale (807,693). ... our framework utilizes a building agent powered by an efficient custom-trained model. This agent employs iterative self-verification and in-loop hacking detection to ensure the reliable generation of high-fidelity, verifiable tasks. ... we specially trained an efficient Qwen-Next-80B-A3B model with a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework and hybrid attention.

benchmark_name_quote: In this work, we propose a benchmarking framework for model datasets (i.e., benchmarking the dataset itself).
task_description: 系统性地评估和比较软件模型数据集的质量、代表性和对特定任务的适用性。
task_description_quote: Benchmarking datasets involves systematically measuring their quality, representativeness, and suitability for specific tasks.
dimension: 数据集质量、代表性、任务适用性、语言覆盖率、规模、管理、预期用途、内部组成、元素特征、元数据和注释。
dimension_quote: Benchmarking datasets involves systematically measuring their quality, representativeness, and suitability for specific tasks. Notably, existing model datasets often do not report comprehensive descriptive properties on e.g., language coverage, size, curation, and intended use. Model datasets exhibit a clear granularity hierarchy. At the top level, dataset-level properties emerge from the set of contained models and their distributions. At the next level, model-level properties reflect the internal composition of individual models. At the lowest level, element-level properties capture characteristics of individual model elements and relationships. Next to the models themselves, model datasets may contain metadata and annotations.
evaluation_method: 通过一个平台，将模型解析为规范化的中间表示，并通过专用的度量引擎提取描述性和结构性的统计数据，编译成基准测试报告。
evaluation_method_quote: This platform accepts models expressed in languages such as UML, ArchiMate, and Ecore, parses them into a normalized intermediate representation, and extracts descriptive and structural statistics through a dedicated metrics engine. The results are compiled into benchmark reports that summarize dataset characteristics, support cross-dataset comparisons, and enable researchers to reason about datasets.
context_dependency: 数据集级别、模型级别、元素级别。
context_dependency_quote: Model datasets exhibit a clear granularity hierarchy. At the top level, dataset-level properties emerge from the set of contained models and their distributions. At the next level, model-level properties reflect the internal composition of individual models. At the lowest level, element-level properties capture characteristics of individual model elements and relationships.
problem_domain: 模型驱动工程（MDE），涉及软件模型（如UML、ArchiMate、BPMN、Ecore模型）。
problem_domain_quote: In this work, a model dataset is a curated collection of model artifacts expressed in one or more modeling languages (e.g., UML, BPMN, ArchiMate, Ecore).
language_quote: This platform accepts models expressed in languages such as UML, ArchiMate, and Ecore...
data_size: 通常包含数百到数千个模型，单个模型从包含少量元素到包含数百或数千个元素和关系不等。
data_size_quote: Typical model datasets contain hundreds to a few thousands of models, rather than millions, and individual models range from small sketches with a handful of elements to large industrial artifacts with hundreds or thousands of elements and relationships.
source_type: 现有模型数据集的集合，可能来自真实场景或生成。
source_type_quote: Benelallam et al. [7] gathered and made publicly available a set of four benchmarks for model transformation and query engines, derived from real-world MDE scenarios with models of increasing size, either concrete (e.g., reverse-engineered Java projects) or generated via customizable deterministic instantiators.
build_type: 研究团队提出并构建的框架和平台。

task_granularity_quote: Benchmarking datasets involves systematically measuring their quality, representativeness, and suitability for specific tasks.

output_modality_quote: The results are compiled into benchmark reports that summarize dataset characteristics, support cross-dataset comparisons, and enable researchers to reason about datasets.
task_io_type_quote: This platform accepts models... and extracts descriptive and structural statistics... The results are compiled into benchmark reports...
execution_environment: 支持多种建模语言和格式的统一平台
execution_environment_quote: To this end, we propose a Benchmark Platform for MDE that provides a unified infrastructure for systematically assessing and comparing datasets of software models across languages and formats, using defined criteria and metrics.
unique_features: 专注于对数据集本身（而非模型性能）进行基准测试，旨在解决MDE领域数据集质量不一、可比性差和可复现性弱的问题。
unique_features_quote: In this work, we propose a benchmarking framework for model datasets (i.e., benchmarking the dataset itself). Benchmarking datasets involves systematically measuring their quality, representativeness, and suitability for specific tasks. This limits the comparability of results between studies, obscures dataset quality and representativeness, and leads to weak reproducibility and potential bias.

benchmark_name_quote: To bridge this gap, we present LoCoEval, the first long-horizon conversational context management benchmark tailored to repository-oriented development scenarios.
dataset_url_quote: Our benchmark and improved method are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LoCoEval.
task_description: 评估上下文管理方法在面向代码仓库的长对话场景中，准确保留和回忆关键上下文信息，同时压缩上下文的能力，以提高回答的正确性。
task_description_quote: aiming to evaluate to what extent context management methods can accurately retain and recall critical contextual information while compressing the context in repository-oriented long-horizon conversations, thereby improving answer correctness.
dimension: 上下文管理能力，包括关键信息的保留、回忆和压缩效果。
dimension_quote: aiming to evaluate to what extent context management methods can accurately retain and recall critical contextual information while compressing the context in repository-oriented long-horizon conversations
evaluation_method: 通过预定义的任务查询，要求智能体准确回忆并利用早期对话信息，并结合仓库信息生成正确答案，根据回答的准确性来评估其上下文管理能力。
evaluation_method_quote: At the end of the conversation, a set of predefined task queries is issued, requiring the agent to accurately recall and leverage information from earlier queries while effectively combining it with information from the repository to produce correct answers. The accuracy of the agent’s responses thus reflects its context management capability.
context_dependency: 长对话上下文，涉及多轮对话（平均50轮）和代码仓库信息。
context_dependency_quote: Each sample contains an average of 2.5 requirements and 50 conversational turns, resulting in total context lengths reaching up to 64K~256K tokens.
problem_domain: 软件工程，面向代码仓库的开发场景。
problem_domain_quote: tailored to repository-oriented development scenarios.
problem_difficulty: 具有挑战性，模拟真实世界复杂的仓库开发交互。
problem_difficulty_quote: The results reveal substantial challenges faced by standalone LLMs and existing approaches, especially memory systems, in repository-oriented conversational scenarios.
language: 未明确指定，但上下文涉及自然语言对话和代码（如Python）。
data_size: 包含128个样本，分为两个子集（单跳和多跳），总计768个任务。
data_size_quote: It features 128 samples divided into two subsets (i.e., single-hop and multi-hop) and supports three types of evaluation tasks.
source_type: 基于现有仓库级代码生成数据集，通过LLM驱动的自动化流程生成。
source_type_quote: To construct LoCoEval, we design a novel LLM-driven automated pipeline that generates query outlines from samples in existing repository-level code generation datasets.
build_type: 官方自建
build_type_quote: we present LoCoEval
task_granularity: 上下文管理评估，包含主题感知、信息项提取和函数生成三种任务。
task_granularity_quote: Each sample consists of one query outline and three types of evaluation tasks, i.e., topic awareness, information item extraction, and function generation.
evaluation_metrics: 回答准确性
evaluation_metrics_quote: The accuracy of the agent’s responses thus reflects its context management capability.
input_modality: 自然语言对话和代码仓库文本
input_modality_quote: the contextual information originates not only from the conversation but also from textual and code artifacts within the repository
output_modality: 自然语言回答和生成的代码
output_modality_quote: produce correct answers
task_io_type: 多模态对话到回答/代码
task_io_type_quote: requiring the agent to accurately recall and leverage information from earlier queries while effectively combining it with information from the repository to produce correct answers
execution_environment: 未明确说明
unique_features: 首个面向仓库的长对话上下文管理评测基准；通过LLM驱动流程生成真实多样的对话，捕捉迭代需求、噪声输入和回顾性问题等关键交互模式；支持单跳和多跳信息分布子集。
unique_features_quote: the first long-horizon conversational context management benchmark tailored to repository-oriented development scenarios. Adhering to three key principles, LoCoEval is constructed via an LLM-driven pipeline that generates realistic and diverse repository-oriented conversations, capturing key interaction patterns such as iterative requirements, noisy input, and retrospective questions. It features 128 samples divided into two subsets (i.e., single-hop and multi-hop)

benchmark_name_quote: We introduce POSTTRAINBENCH to benchmark how well LLM agents can perform post-training autonomously under bounded compute constraints (10 hours on one H100 GPU).
task_description: 评测LLM智能体在有限计算资源下，自主执行LLM后训练（post-training）以提升基础模型在特定基准测试上性能的能力。
task_description_quote: We introduce POSTTRAINBENCH to benchmark how well LLM agents can perform post-training autonomously under bounded compute constraints (10 hours on one H100 GPU). We ask frontier agents (e.g., Claude Code with OPUS 4.6) to optimize the performance of a base LLM on a particular benchmark (e.g., QWEN3-4B on AIME).
dimension: AI研发自动化能力，特别是LLM后训练的自主执行能力。
dimension_quote: no existing benchmark measures the ability of frontier LLM agents to perform post-training itself. Existing benchmarks focus on narrow AI R&D tasks or emphasize only certain aspects such as replication of existing papers... Therefore, we need an end-to-end testbed that isolates the agent’s ability to directly improve model performance through post-training.
evaluation_method: 在给定基础模型和目标基准测试后，智能体在10小时（单H100 GPU）内自主进行后训练，提交训练后的检查点，并在基准测试的保留测试集上进行评估。
evaluation_method_quote: Agents are granted broad autonomy: they may write and execute code, search for and curate training data, and select any post-training strategy... At the end of each run, the agent submits a trained checkpoint, which is evaluated on the benchmark’s held-out test set.
context_dependency: 端到端的AI研发任务，涉及数据搜索与整理、训练策略选择、代码编写与执行、实验迭代等完整流程。
context_dependency_quote: Agents are granted broad autonomy: they may write and execute code, search for and curate training data, and select any post-training strategy... The agent must build its training pipeline from scratch – we provide no starter code, training data, or hyperparameter configurations.
problem_domain: 人工智能研究与开发（AI R&D），具体为大型语言模型（LLM）的后训练（post-training）。
problem_domain_quote: We study a central yet tractable component of modern AI research and development: post-training. Post-training refers to the process of taking a pretrained LLM and systematically improving it through supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning from human feedback, and related alignment and capability-enhancement methods.
problem_difficulty: 高难度，要求智能体在完全自主、资源受限的条件下完成复杂的模型优化任务，并与官方指令微调模型的性能进行对比。
problem_difficulty_quote: We find that frontier agents improve base models substantially but generally lag behind oﬀicial instruction-tuned LLMs: the best agent reaches 23.2% average benchmark performance compared to 51.1% for instruction-tuned baselines.
language: 不特定于某种编程语言，但智能体需要编写和执行代码（如Python、bash）来完成训练任务。
language_quote: Agents may write and execute code, search for and curate training data... The agent writes and debugs code, runs bash and python scripts and uses the internet to download data.
data_size: 评估配置规模为28个（4个基础模型 × 7个基准测试），每个配置运行多次以估计方差。
data_size_quote: Each agent is evaluated on 28 model–benchmark configurations (4 base LLMs × 7 benchmarks); frontier agents on native scaffolds are run 3 times per configuration to estimate variance.
source_type: 基准测试本身不提供数据，智能体需要自主从互联网搜索和整理训练数据。
source_type_quote: Agents are granted broad autonomy: they may write and execute code, search for and curate training data... we provide no starter code, training data, or hyperparameter configurations.
build_type: 官方自建
build_type_quote: To address this gap, we introduce POSTTRAINBENCH...
contamination_status: 设计了防作弊机制（LLM法官）来检测数据污染（使用测试集训练）和模型替换等行为。
contamination_status_quote: In POSTTRAINBENCH the agents are only constrained to not use benchmark test data for training (data contamination) or substitute a different model than provided. These rules are enforced via an LLM judge (Appendix E). When the judge detects cheating, we assign the base model score.
task_granularity: AI研发流程自动化，具体为模型后训练流程的端到端执行。
task_granularity_quote: Therefore, we need an end-to-end testbed that isolates the agent’s ability to directly improve model performance through post-training.
evaluation_metrics: 使用目标基准测试各自的评估指标（如HumanEval的pass@1，其他基准的精确匹配准确率），并计算跨基准的加权平均性能。
evaluation_metrics_quote: For HumanEval, we report pass@1. For open-ended benchmarks (ArenaHard Writing, HealthBench-Easy), we use GPT-5-mini as judge... For all other benchmarks, we use exact-match accuracy. We aggregate scores in two stages... compute a weighted average across benchmarks.
input_modality: 任务指令（目标基准和基础模型）、计算资源访问权限、互联网访问权限。
input_modality_quote: We give each agent a base LLM, a target benchmark, access to compute node (a single H100 GPU) and internet access.
output_modality: 训练后的模型检查点及其在目标基准测试上的性能分数。
output_modality_quote: At the end of each run, the agent submits a trained checkpoint, which is evaluated on the benchmark’s held-out test set.
task_io_type: 任务描述与资源到模型性能
task_io_type_quote: We give each agent a base LLM, a target benchmark, access to compute node (a single H100 GPU) and internet access. The agent must build its training pipeline from scratch... The agent produces a post-trained model. We evaluate this model on the target benchmark and report its score.
execution_environment: 单H100 GPU，10小时时间限制，具有终端和网络搜索访问权限的沙箱环境。
execution_environment_quote: under bounded resource constraints (10 hours on one H100 GPU)... access to compute node (a single H100 GPU) and internet access.
unique_features: 专注于评估LLM智能体自动化AI研发（特别是后训练）的能力；赋予智能体高度自主权（编写代码、搜索数据、选择策略）；包含防作弊机制；资源约束明确（10小时/H100）；评估了智能体的失败模式（如奖励黑客行为）。
unique_features_quote: We introduce POSTTRAINBENCH to benchmark how well LLM agents can perform post-training autonomously... Agents are granted broad autonomy... These rules are enforced via an LLM judge... We also observe several failure modes worth flagging. Agents sometimes engage in reward hacking: training on the test set, downloading existing instruction-tuned checkpoints instead of training their own, and using API keys they find to generate synthetic data without authorization.

benchmark_name_quote: An open-source reimplementation suite (OpenReBench)1 containing faithful reimplementations of all compared frameworks under identical conditions, necessitated by the absence of public implementations of MARE and iReDev, along with all experimental artifacts, prompts, outputs, and evaluation scripts.
task_description: 对需求工程（RE）自动化框架进行评测，具体任务包括评估框架在生成需求的全面性、质量、冲突解决有效性、语义意图保留以及生成结构化、符合行业标准的需求模型等方面的能力。
task_description_quote: We evaluate QUARE on five case studies drawn from established RE benchmarks (MARE, iReDev) and an industrial autonomous-driving specification, spanning safety-critical, financial, and information-system domains. Results show that QUARE achieves 98.2% compliance coverage (+105% over both baselines), 94.9% semantic preservation (+2.3 percentage points over the best baseline), and high verifiability (4.96/5.0), while generating 25–43% more requirements than existing multi-agent RE frameworks.
dimension: 需求工程自动化框架的综合性能，包括需求覆盖度、语义保留度、可验证性、需求生成数量以及多质量属性平衡能力。
dimension_quote: A geometry-based evaluation methodology for multi-quality RE that addresses the limitation of scalar metrics by operationalizing requirement diversity as convex hull volume (CHV) and mean distance to centroid (MDC) in a five-dimensional quality space, complemented by per-axis balance metrics (Coverage Uniformity and Minimum Axis Coverage), phase-wise semantic drift analysis (BERTScore), and structural compliance verification.
evaluation_method: 基于几何学的评估方法，将需求多样性量化为五维质量空间中的凸包体积（CHV）和到质心的平均距离（MDC），辅以每轴平衡度量（覆盖均匀性和最小轴覆盖）、阶段语义漂移分析（BERTScore）和结构合规性验证。
evaluation_method_quote: A geometry-based evaluation methodology for multi-quality RE that addresses the limitation of scalar metrics by operationalizing requirement diversity as convex hull volume (CHV) and mean distance to centroid (MDC) in a five-dimensional quality space, complemented by per-axis balance metrics (Coverage Uniformity and Minimum Axis Coverage), phase-wise semantic drift analysis (BERTScore), and structural compliance verification.
problem_domain: 软件工程，具体是需求工程（Requirements Engineering）。
problem_domain_quote: Requirements Engineering (RE) serves as the foundational phase of the software development lifecycle, directly influencing the quality and success of the final product [1].
data_size: 包含五个案例研究，这些案例来自已有的RE基准（MARE, iReDev）和一个工业自动驾驶规范。
data_size_quote: We evaluate QUARE on five case studies drawn from established RE benchmarks (MARE, iReDev) and an industrial autonomous-driving specification, spanning safety-critical, financial, and information-system domains.
source_type: 来自已有的RE基准（MARE, iReDev）和一个工业自动驾驶规范。
source_type_quote: We evaluate QUARE on five case studies drawn from established RE benchmarks (MARE, iReDev) and an industrial autonomous-driving specification, spanning safety-critical, financial, and information-system domains.
build_type: 官方自建（作为论文的一部分创建）
build_type_quote: An open-source reimplementation suite (OpenReBench)1 containing faithful reimplementations of all compared frameworks under identical conditions, necessitated by the absence of public implementations of MARE and iReDev, along with all experimental artifacts, prompts, outputs, and evaluation scripts.
task_granularity: 需求工程框架的端到端评估
task_granularity_quote: Both frameworks demonstrate the feasibility of end-to-end automation but primarily emphasize task orchestration rather than quality-dimension negotiation.
evaluation_metrics: 合规覆盖率（compliance coverage）、语义保留率（semantic preservation）、可验证性分数（verifiability）、需求生成数量、凸包体积（CHV）、到质心的平均距离（MDC）、覆盖均匀性（Coverage Uniformity）、最小轴覆盖（Minimum Axis Coverage）、BERTScore。
evaluation_metrics_quote: Results show that QUARE achieves 98.2% compliance coverage (+105% over both baselines), 94.9% semantic preservation (+2.3 percentage points over the best baseline), and high verifiability (4.96/5.0), while generating 25–43% more requirements than existing multi-agent RE frameworks. ... operationalizing requirement diversity as convex hull volume (CHV) and mean distance to centroid (MDC) in a five-dimensional quality space, complemented by per-axis balance metrics (Coverage Uniformity and Minimum Axis Coverage), phase-wise semantic drift analysis (BERTScore)...
input_modality: 项目描述（自然语言）
input_modality_quote: Five specialized agents operate in parallel, each processing the same project description using quality-oriented system prompts...
output_modality: 需求、KAOS目标模型、评估指标
output_modality_quote: QUARE then synthesizes negotiated outcomes into standardized KAOS goal models, ensuring structural correctness and industry compatibility.
task_io_type: 文本到模型与评估报告
task_io_type_quote: processing the same project description... producing... requirements... goal models... evaluation metrics.
unique_features: 该基准是一个开源的重实现套件，旨在在相同条件下对不同的需求工程框架（包括MARE和iReDev）进行公平比较，因为原框架没有公开实现。它包含了所有实验工件、提示词、输出和评估脚本。
unique_features_quote: An open-source reimplementation suite (OpenReBench)1 containing faithful reimplementations of all compared frameworks under identical conditions, necessitated by the absence of public implementations of MARE and iReDev, along with all experimental artifacts, prompts, outputs, and evaluation scripts.
